arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: طه
english translation text:
Ta Ha!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: مَا أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لِتَشْقَىٰ
english translation text:
We did not send down to you the Quran that you should be miserable,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ
english translation text:
but only as an admonition to him who fears [his Lord].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: تَنزِيلًا مِّمَّنْ خَلَقَ الْأَرْضَ وَالسَّمَاوَاتِ الْعُلَى
english translation text:
A sending down [of the Revelation] from Him who created the earth and the lofty heavens
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: الرَّحْمَٰنُ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ اسْتَوَىٰ
english translation text:
—the All-beneficent, settled on the Throne.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ الثَّرَىٰ
english translation text:
To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth, and whatever is between them, and whatever is under the ground.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَإِن تَجْهَرْ بِالْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ السِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
english translation text:
Whether you speak loudly [or in secret tones,] He indeed knows the secret and what is still more hidden.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ لَهُ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَىٰ
english translation text:
Allah—there is no god except Him—to Him belong the Best Names.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَهَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Did the story of Moses come to you,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِذْ رَأَىٰ نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ امْكُثُوا إِنِّي آنَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّي آتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى النَّارِ هُدًى
english translation text:
when he sighted a fire, and said to his family, ‘Wait! Indeed, I descry a fire! Maybe I will bring you a brand from it, or find some guidance at the fire.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَلَمَّا أَتَاهَا نُودِيَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
So when he came to it, he was called, ‘O Moses!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنِّي أَنَا رَبُّكَ فَاخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ ۖ إِنَّكَ بِالْوَادِ الْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
english translation text:
Indeed I am your Lord! So take off your sandals. You are indeed in the sacred valley of Tuwa.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَنَا اخْتَرْتُكَ فَاسْتَمِعْ لِمَا يُوحَىٰ
english translation text:
I have chosen you; so listen to what is revealed.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّنِي أَنَا اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا فَاعْبُدْنِي وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ لِذِكْرِي
english translation text:
Indeed I am Allah—there is no god except Me. So worship Me, and maintain the prayer for My remembrance.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّ السَّاعَةَ آتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
english translation text:
Indeed the Hour is bound to come: I will have it hidden, so that every soul may be rewarded for its endeavour.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَاتَّبَعَ هَوَاهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
english translation text:
So do not let yourself be distracted from it by those who do not believe in it and who follow their desires, or you will perish.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَا تِلْكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
‘Moses, what is that in your right hand?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ أَتَوَكَّأُ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِي وَلِيَ فِيهَا مَآرِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘It is my staff. I lean on it, and with it I beat down leaves for my sheep; and I have other uses for it.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ أَلْقِهَا يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Moses, throw it down.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَلْقَاهَا فَإِذَا هِيَ حَيَّةٌ تَسْعَىٰ
english translation text:
So he threw it down, and behold, it was a snake, moving swiftly.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ ۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا الْأُولَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Take hold of it, and do not fear. We will restore it to its former state.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاضْمُمْ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَاءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوءٍ آيَةً أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
Now clasp your hand to your armpit: it will emerge white, without any harm—[this is yet] another sign,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنْ آيَاتِنَا الْكُبْرَى
english translation text:
that We may show you some of Our great signs.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُ طَغَىٰ
english translation text:
Go to Pharaoh. He has indeed rebelled.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Open my breast for me.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
english translation text:
Make my task easy for me.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي
english translation text:
Remove the hitch from my tongue,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
english translation text:
[so that] they may understand my speech.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاجْعَل لِّي وَزِيرًا مِّنْ أَهْلِي
english translation text:
Appoint for me a minister from my family,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: هَارُونَ أَخِي
english translation text:
Aaron, my brother.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اشْدُدْ بِهِ أَزْرِي
english translation text:
Strengthen my back through him,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَشْرِكْهُ فِي أَمْرِي
english translation text:
and make him my associate in my task,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كَيْ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرًا
english translation text:
so that we may glorify You greatly,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَنَذْكُرَكَ كَثِيرًا
english translation text:
and remember You greatly.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًا
english translation text:
Indeed You see us best.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Moses, your request has been granted!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
Certainly, We have done you a favour another time,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰ
english translation text:
when We revealed to your mother whatever was to be revealed:
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَنِ اقْذِفِيهِ فِي التَّابُوتِ فَاقْذِفِيهِ فِي الْيَمِّ فَلْيُلْقِهِ الْيَمُّ بِالسَّاحِلِ يَأْخُذْهُ عَدُوٌّ لِّي وَعَدُوٌّ لَّهُ ۚ وَأَلْقَيْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَحَبَّةً مِّنِّي وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيْنِي
english translation text:
“Put him in the casket, and cast it into the river. Then the river will cast it on the bank, and he shall be picked up by an enemy of Mine and an enemy of his.” And I made you endearing, and that you might be reared under My [watchful] eyes.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِذْ تَمْشِي أُخْتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكْفُلُهُ ۖ فَرَجَعْنَاكَ إِلَىٰ أُمِّكَ كَيْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ ۚ
english translation text:
When your sister walked up [to Pharaoh’s palace] saying, “Shall I show you someone who will take care of him?” Then We restored you to your mother, that she might not grieve and be comforted.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَقَتَلْتَ نَفْسًا فَنَجَّيْنَاكَ مِنَ الْغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّاكَ فُتُونًا ۚ فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِي أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئْتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٍ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Then you slew a soul, whereupon We delivered you from anguish, and We tried you with various ordeals. Then you stayed for several years among the people of Midian. Then you turned up as ordained, O Moses!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاصْطَنَعْتُكَ لِنَفْسِي
english translation text:
And I chose you for Myself.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِآيَاتِي وَلَا تَنِيَا فِي ذِكْرِي
english translation text:
‘Go ahead, you and your brother, with My signs and do not flag in My remembrance.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اذْهَبَا إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُ طَغَىٰ
english translation text:
Both of you go to Pharaoh, for he has indeed rebelled.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَقُولَا لَهُ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
english translation text:
Speak to him in a soft manner; maybe he will take admonition or fear.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَا رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَا أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Our Lord! We are indeed afraid that he will forestall us or will exceed all bounds.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَا ۖ إِنَّنِي مَعَكُمَا أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Do not be afraid, for I will be with the two of you, hearing and seeing [whatever happens].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَا إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ ۖ قَدْ جِئْنَاكَ بِآيَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۖ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ اتَّبَعَ الْهُدَىٰ
english translation text:
So approach him and say, ‘‘We are the apostles of your Lord. Let the Children of Israel go with us, and do not torture them! We certainly bring you a sign from your Lord, and may peace be upon him who follows guidance!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّا قَدْ أُوحِيَ إِلَيْنَا أَنَّ الْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
english translation text:
Indeed it has been revealed to us that punishment shall befall those who impugn us and turn their backs [on us].’’ ’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Who is your Lord, Moses?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ رَبُّنَا الَّذِي أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ خَلْقَهُ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Our Lord is He who gave everything its creation and then guided it.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ الْقُرُونِ الْأُولَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘What about the former generations?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّي فِي كِتَابٍ ۖ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّي وَلَا يَنسَى
english translation text:
He said, ‘Their knowledge is with my Lord, in a Book. My Lord neither makes any error nor forgets.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: الَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِ أَزْوَاجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
english translation text:
He, who made the earth for you a cradle, and in it threaded for you ways, and sent down water from the sky, and with it We brought forth various kinds of vegetation.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كُلُوا وَارْعَوْا أَنْعَامَكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِّأُولِي النُّهَىٰ
english translation text:
‘Eat and pasture your cattle.’ There are indeed signs in that for those who have sense.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: مِنْهَا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
From it did We create you, into it shall We return you, and from it shall We bring you forth another time.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنَاهُ آيَاتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
english translation text:
Certainly We showed him all Our signs. But he denied [them] and refused [to believe them].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Moses, have you come to us to expel us from our land with your magic?
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِ فَاجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُ نَحْنُ وَلَا أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
english translation text:
Yet we [too] will bring you a magic like it! So fix a tryst between us and you, which neither we shall fail nor you, at a middle place.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ الزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ النَّاسُ ضُحًى
english translation text:
He said, ‘Your tryst shall be the Day of Adornment, and let the people be assembled in early forenoon.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيْدَهُ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
english translation text:
Then Pharaoh withdrew [to consult privately], summoned up his guile, and then arrived [at the scene of the contest].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا عَلَى اللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ افْتَرَىٰ
english translation text:
Moses said to them, ‘Woe to you! Do not fabricate lies against Allah, or He will obliterate you with a punishment. Whoever fabricates lies certainly fails.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَتَنَازَعُوا أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ وَأَسَرُّوا النَّجْوَىٰ
english translation text:
So they disputed their matter among themselves, and kept their confidential talks secret.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنْ هَٰذَانِ لَسَاحِرَانِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ الْمُثْلَىٰ
english translation text:
They said, ‘These two are indeed magicians who intend to expel you from your land with their magic, and to abolish your excellent tradition!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَجْمِعُوا كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ائْتُوا صَفًّا ۚ وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْيَوْمَ مَنِ اسْتَعْلَىٰ
english translation text:
So summon up your ingenuity, then come in ranks. Today he who has the upper hand will be felicitous!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا يَا مُوسَىٰ إِمَّا أَن تُلْقِيَ وَإِمَّا أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
english translation text:
They said, ‘O Moses! Will you throw first, or shall we?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ بَلْ أَلْقُوا ۖ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمْ وَعِصِيُّهُمْ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيْهِ مِن سِحْرِهِمْ أَنَّهَا تَسْعَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘No, you throw first.’ Thereupon, behold, their ropes and staffs appeared to him by their magic to wriggle swiftly.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَوْجَسَ فِي نَفْسِهِ خِيفَةً مُّوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Then Moses felt a fear within his heart.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْأَعْلَىٰ
english translation text:
We said, ‘Do not be afraid. Indeed, you will have the upper hand.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِي يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوا ۖ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا كَيْدُ سَاحِرٍ ۖ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ السَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
english translation text:
Throw down what is in your right hand, and it will swallow what they have conjured. What they have conjured is only a magician’s trick, and the magician does not fare well wherever he may show up.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأُلْقِيَ السَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوا آمَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَارُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Thereat the magicians fell down prostrating. They said, ‘We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ آمَنتُمْ لَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ آذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ الَّذِي عَلَّمَكُمُ السِّحْرَ ۖ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Did you believe in him before I should permit you? He is indeed your chief who has taught you magic!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قفَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَافٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ فِي جُذُوعِ النَّخْلِ وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَا أَشَدُّ عَذَابًا وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
Surely, I will cut off your hands and feet from opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will know which of us can inflict a severer and more lasting punishment.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا لَن نُّؤْثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَاءَنَا مِنَ الْبَيِّنَاتِ وَالَّذِي فَطَرَنَا ۖ فَاقْضِ مَا أَنتَ قَاضٍ ۖ إِنَّمَا تَقْضِي هَٰذِهِ الْحَيَاةَ الدُّنْيَا
english translation text:
They said, ‘We will never prefer you to the clear proofs which have come to us, and to Him who originated us. Decide whatever you want to decide. You can only decide about the life of this world.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّا آمَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطَايَانَا وَمَا أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ السِّحْرِ ۗ وَاللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
We have indeed believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our offences and the magic you compelled us to perform. Allah is better and more lasting.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّهُ مَن يَأْتِ رَبَّهُ مُجْرِمًا فَإِنَّ لَهُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
english translation text:
Whoever comes to his Lord laden with guilt, for him shall be hell, where he will neither live nor die.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَن يَأْتِهِ مُؤْمِنًا قَدْ عَمِلَ الصَّالِحَاتِ فَأُولَٰئِكَ لَهُمُ الدَّرَجَاتُ الْعُلَىٰ
english translation text:
But whoever comes to Him with faith and he has done righteous deeds, for such shall be the highest ranks
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الْأَنْهَارُ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَاءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
english translation text:
—the Gardens of Eden, with streams running in them, to abide in them [forever], and that is the reward of him who keeps pure.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي فَاضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِي الْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخَافُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
english translation text:
We revealed to Moses, [saying], ‘Set out with My servants at night, and strike out for them a dry path through the sea. Do not be afraid of being overtaken, and have no fear [of getting drowned].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ الْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ
english translation text:
Then Pharaoh pursued them with his troops, whereat they were engulfed by what engulfed them of the sea.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide them.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنَاكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوَاعَدْنَاكُمْ جَانِبَ الطُّورِ الْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَنَّ وَالسَّلْوَىٰ
english translation text:
O Children of Israel! We delivered you from your enemy, and We appointed with you a tryst on the right side of the Mount and We sent down to you manna and quails:
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كُلُوا مِن طَيِّبَاتِ مَا رَزَقْنَاكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِي ۖ وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِي فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
english translation text:
‘Eat of the good things We have provided you, but do not overstep the bounds therein, lest My wrath should descend on you, and he on whom My wrath descends certainly perishes.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَإِنِّي لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَآمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا ثُمَّ اهْتَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Indeed I forgive those who repent, become faithful, act righteously, and follow guidance.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَا أَعْجَلَكَ عَن قَوْمِكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
[God said,] ‘O Moses, what has prompted you to hasten ahead of your people?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ هُمْ أُولَاءِ عَلَىٰ أَثَرِي وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘They are close upon my heels, and I hurried on to You, my Lord, that You may be pleased.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِن بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ السَّامِرِيُّ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Indeed We tried your people in your absence, and the Samiri has led them astray.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ غَضْبَانَ أَسِفًا ۚ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا ۚ
english translation text:
Thereupon Moses returned to his people, indignant and grieved. He said, ‘O my people! Did your Lord not give you a true promise
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فأَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِي
english translation text:
Did the period [of my absence] seem too long to you? Or did you desire that your Lord’s wrath should descend on you and so you failed your tryst with me?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا مَا أَخْلَفْنَا مَوْعِدَكَ بِمَلْكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حُمِّلْنَا أَوْزَارًا مِّن زِينَةِ الْقَوْمِ فَقَذَفْنَاهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلْقَى السَّامِرِيُّ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We did not fail our tryst with you of our own accord, but we were laden with the weight of those people’s ornaments, and we cast them [into the fire] and so did the Samiri.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًا جَسَدًا لَّهُ خُوَارٌ فَقَالُوا هَٰذَا إِلَٰهُكُمْ وَإِلَٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِيَ
english translation text:
Then he produced for them a calf—a [lifeless] body with a low—and they said, This is your god and the god of Moses, so he forgot!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا
english translation text:
Did they not see that it did not answer them, nor could it bring them any benefit or harm?
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ قَالَ لَهُمْ هَارُونُ مِن قَبْلُ يَا قَوْمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِ ۖ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ فَاتَّبِعُونِي وَأَطِيعُوا أَمْرِي
english translation text:
Aaron had certainly told them earlier, ‘O my people! You are only being tested by it. Indeed your Lord is the All-beneficent. So follow me and obey my command!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا لَن نَّبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
They had said, ‘We will keep on clinging to it until Moses returns to us.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ يَا هَارُونُ مَا مَنَعَكَ إِذْ رَأَيْتَهُمْ ضَلُّوا
english translation text:
He said, ‘O Aaron! What kept you, when you saw them going astray,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِ ۖ أَفَعَصَيْتَ أَمْرِي
english translation text:
from following me? Did you disobey my command?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ يَا ابْنَ أُمَّ لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِي وَلَا بِرَأْسِي ۖ إِنِّي خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقْتَ بَيْنَ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ وَلَمْ تَرْقُبْ قَوْلِي
english translation text:
He said, ‘O son of my mother! Do not grab my beard or my head! I feared lest you should say, ‘‘You have caused a rift among the Children of Israel and did not heed my word [of advice].’’’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكَ يَا سَامِرِيُّ
english translation text:
He said, ‘What is your business, O Samiri?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ بَصُرْتُ بِمَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا بِهِ فَقَبَضْتُ قَبْضَةً مِّنْ أَثَرِ الرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذْتُهَا وَكَذَٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتْ لِي نَفْسِي
english translation text:
He said, ‘I saw what they did not see. I took a handful [of dust] from the messenger’s trail and threw it. That is how my soul prompted me.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَاذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِي الْحَيَاةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّن تُخْلَفَهُ ۖ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Begone! It shall be your [lot] throughout life to say, ‘‘Do not touch me!’’ Indeed, there is a tryst for you which you will not fail to keep!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَانظُرْ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِكَ الَّذِي ظَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفًا ۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُ فِي الْيَمِّ نَسْفًا
english translation text:
Now look at your god to whom you went on clinging. We will burn it down and then scatter it[s ashes] into the sea.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّمَا إِلَٰهُكُمُ اللَّهُ الَّذِي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمًا
english translation text:
Indeed your God is Allah. There is no god except Him. He embraces all things in [His] knowledge.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَنبَاءِ مَا قَدْ سَبَقَ ۚ وَقَدْ آتَيْنَاكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكْرًا
english translation text:
Thus do We relate to you some accounts of what is past. Certainly, We have given you a Reminder from Ourselves.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: مَّنْ أَعْرَضَ عَنْهُ فَإِنَّهُ يَحْمِلُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وِزْرًا
english translation text:
Whoever disregards it shall bear a burden [of punishment] on the Day of Resurrection,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: خَالِدِينَ فِيهِ ۖ وَسَاءَ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ حِمْلًا
english translation text:
remaining in it [forever]. Evil is their burden on the Day of Resurrection
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِي الصُّورِ ۚ وَنَحْشُرُ الْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا
english translation text:
—the day the Trumpet will be blown; on that day We shall muster the guilty with blind eyes.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَتَخَافَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا
english translation text:
They will whisper to one another: ‘You have stayed only for ten [days].’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
english translation text:
We know best what they will say, when the smartest of them in approach will say, ‘You stayed only a day!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّي نَسْفًا
english translation text:
They question you concerning the mountains. Say, ‘My Lord will scatter them [like dust].’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا
english translation text:
Then He will leave it a level plain.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَا أَمْتًا
english translation text:
You will not see any crookedness or unevenness in it.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ الدَّاعِيَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُ ۖ وَخَشَعَتِ الْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
english translation text:
On that day they will follow the summoner without zigzagging. Their voices will be muted before the All-beneficent, and you will hear nothing but a murmur.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وَرَضِيَ لَهُ قَوْلًا
english translation text:
Intercession will not avail that day except from him whom the All-beneficent allows and approves of his word.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِ عِلْمًا
english translation text:
He knows what is before them and behind them, though they do not comprehend Him in their knowledge.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
english translation text:
All faces shall be humbled before the Living One, the All-sustainer, and those who bear [the burden of] wrongdoing will fail.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ الصَّالِحَاتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
english translation text:
But whoever does righteous deeds, being faithful, will neither fear any injustice or disparagement.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنَاهُ قُرْآنًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ الْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
english translation text:
Thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Quran and We have paraphrased the warnings in it variously so that they may be Godwary, or it may prompt them to remembrance.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَتَعَالَى اللَّهُ الْمَلِكُ الْحَقُّ ۗ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِالْقُرْآنِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُ ۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
english translation text:
So exalted is Allah, the True Sovereign. Do not hasten with the Quran before its revelation is completed for you, and say, ‘My Lord! Increase me in knowledge.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَا إِلَىٰ آدَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِيَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُ عَزْمًا
english translation text:
Certainly We had enjoined Adam earlier; but he forgot, and We did not find any resoluteness in him.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ اسْجُدُوا لِآدَمَ فَسَجَدُوا إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
english translation text:
When We said to the angels, ‘Prostrate before Adam,’ they prostrated, but not Iblis: he refused.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَقُلْنَا يَا آدَمُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا عَدُوٌّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوْجِكَ فَلَا يُخْرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ فَتَشْقَىٰ
english translation text:
We said, ‘O Adam! This is indeed an enemy of yours and your mate’s. So do not let him expel you from paradise, or you will be miserable.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعْرَىٰ
english translation text:
You will neither be hungry in it nor naked.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظْمَأُ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضْحَىٰ
english translation text:
You will neither be thirsty in it, nor suffer from [the heat of] the sun.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ الشَّيْطَانُ قَالَ يَا آدَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ الْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
english translation text:
Then Satan tempted him. He said, ‘O Adam! Shall I show you the tree of immortality, and an imperishable kingdom?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْآتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ الْجَنَّةِ ۚ وَعَصَىٰ آدَمُ رَبَّهُ فَغَوَىٰ
english translation text:
So they both ate of it, and their nakedness became evident to them, and they began to stitch over themselves with the leaves of paradise. Adam disobeyed his Lord, and went amiss.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: ثُمَّ اجْتَبَاهُ رَبُّهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Then his Lord chose him, and turned to him clemently, and guided him.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ اهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًا ۖ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ ۖ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّي هُدًى فَمَنِ اتَّبَعَ هُدَايَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Get down both of you from it, all together, being enemies of one another! Yet, should any guidance come to you from Me, those who follow My guidance will not go astray, nor will they be miserable.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ عَن ذِكْرِي فَإِنَّ لَهُ مَعِيشَةً ضَنكًا وَنَحْشُرُهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ أَعْمَىٰ
english translation text:
But whoever disregards My remembrance, his shall be a wretched life, and We shall raise him blind on the Day of Resurrection.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِي أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
english translation text:
He will say, ‘My Lord! Why have You raised me blind, though I used to see?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ آيَاتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ الْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ
english translation text:
He will say: ‘So it is. Our signs came to you, but you forgot them, and so you will be forgotten today.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِي مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِن بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِ ۚ وَلَعَذَابُ الْآخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
Thus do We requite those who transgress and do not believe in the signs of their Lord, and the punishment of the Hereafter is severer and more lasting.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَفَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ الْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِي مَسَاكِنِهِمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِّأُولِي النُّهَىٰ
english translation text:
Does it not dawn upon them how many generations We have destroyed before them, amid [the ruins of] whose dwellings they walk? There are indeed signs in this for those who have reason.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامًا وَأَجَلٌ مُّسَمًّى
english translation text:
Were it not for a prior decree of your Lord and a specified time, [their doom] would have attended [their guilt].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ الشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا ۖ وَمِنْ آنَاءِ اللَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ النَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ
english translation text:
So be patient with what they say, and celebrate the praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before the sunset, and glorify Him in watches of the night and at the day’s ends, that you may be pleased.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِ أَزْوَاجًا مِّنْهُمْ زَهْرَةَ الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا لِنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَرِزْقُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
Do not extend your glance toward what We have provided certain groups of them as a glitter of the life of this world, so that We may test them thereby. The provision of your Lord is better and more lasting.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِالصَّلَاةِ وَاصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا ۖ لَا نَسْأَلُكَ رِزْقًا ۖ نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ ۗ وَالْعَاقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
english translation text:
And bid your family to prayer and be steadfast in maintaining it. We do not ask any provision of you: it is We who provide for you, and to Godwariness belongs the ultimate outcome [in the Hereafter].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَقَالُوا لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِآيَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِ ۚ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِي الصُّحُفِ الْأُولَىٰ
english translation text:
They say, ‘Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?’ Has there not come to them a clear proof in that which is in the former scriptures?
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَوْ أَنَّا أَهْلَكْنَاهُم بِعَذَابٍ مِّن قَبْلِهِ لَقَالُوا رَبَّنَا لَوْلَا أَرْسَلْتَ إِلَيْنَا رَسُولًا فَنَتَّبِعَ آيَاتِكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن نَّذِلَّ وَنَخْزَىٰ
english translation text:
Had We destroyed them with a punishment before it, they would have surely said, ‘Our Lord! Why did You not send us an apostle so that we might have followed Your signs before we were abased and disgraced?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قُلْ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحَابُ الصِّرَاطِ السَّوِيِّ وَمَنِ اهْتَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Say, ‘Everyone [of us] is waiting. So wait! Soon you will know who are the people of the right path, and who is [rightly] guided.’
Taha – Ta-Ha
